meta.title: About SGS | International Clean Energy Advisory
meta.description: About SGS: an international renewable energy consulting, project development, and sustainable infrastructure advisory firm.

hero.title: Clean energy and water advisory.
hero.text: Since 2015, SGS has supported teams across MENA with practical guidance, trusted partners, and clear next steps.

intro.title: Hands-on advisory leadership.
intro.text: SGS combines strategy, project planning, and technical coordination to align stakeholders and keep delivery on track.

pillars.title: Clean infrastructure from idea to action.
Grow renewable energy and resilient utility systems across priority markets.
Open collaboration, trust, and practical partnerships.

market_focus.title: GCC and MENA focus. Global support.
market_focus.text: Local delivery stays connected to international suppliers and specialist partners for stronger options and clearer delivery paths.

cards.title: Renewable energy leads
cards.text: Solar and clean infrastructure are at the center of the offer.

cards.title: Advisory mindset
cards.text: Projects, partnerships, and delivery pathways are structured with clarity.

cards.title: Technical credibility
cards.text: Core strengths include water, desalination, wastewater, and EPC coordination.

cards.title: Long-term thinking
cards.text: Execution support continues through operations and long-term continuity.
